heroHeadline: Pernod Ricard–Brown-Forman Merger Talks Collapse in Major Franco-American Spirits Deal Failure
heroSubtitle: From Clovis I and the Frankish kingdom (481 CE) to Macron's Fifth Republic — tracking the complete arc of French history: 13 dynasties, 5 republics, 2 empires, and the world's most influential political tradition.
footerNote: Data sourced from official archives (Archives nationales, Élysée Palace, Service historique de la Défense), peer-reviewed scholarship, and major international outlets. Historical casualty and demographic figures carry inherent uncertainty.
